metadata.description: OloLand's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Institutional buy-side underwriting depth on top of Anthropic's finance plugin lineup: deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE primitives, cross-deal learning, and the compliance hooks Anthropic's vertical plugins ship empty.

plugins.name: ololand-dd
plugins.description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / Real Options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy with industry overlays, forensic QoE primitives (Beneish, Benford, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection), cross-document reconciliation with source hierarchy (CPA > tax > management > AI), MaskablePPO war-game competitive simulation, middle-office assumption controls that gate IC approval, observability M1+M2 audit trail (agent_runs, agent_spans, regulator-grade replay, compliance-framework exports), OloNet competitive-intel feed (gateway-ingested AI financial-services moves), and a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Three sub-agents: dd-analyst, forensic-screener (Pre-LOI 7-primitive forensic battery), war-game-strategist (16-quarter competitive simulation). Twenty-seven commands including /verify, /remember and /recall (persistent deal record), /inspect-run, /replay-run, /regulator-export (observability + regulator defense), /plan (pre-execution plan review before the executor fires), /ai-finserv-moves (browse OloNet competitive-intel feed), /pre-screen, /ic-memo-skeptical, /assumption-controls, /ic-approve-readiness, /playbook-recall, and /calibrate-vs-history. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin.

plugins.name: ololand-compliance-hooks
plugins.description: Drop-in compliance, citation, and provenance hooks for Anthropic's Claude Cowork finance plugins. PreToolUse MNPI guard, PostToolUse citation enforcer, audit-log writeback, tier-capacity warning, and evidence-quality warning for OloLand's IC approval gate. Populates the empty hooks/ scaffold Anthropic's finance verticals ship with.

plugins.name: ololand-forensic-qoe
plugins.description: Forensic Quality-of-Earnings primitives as a standalone plugin: Beneish M-Score, Benford's Law, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection, working-capital deep dive, and covenant-cascade analysis (cross-default chain modeling). The Pre-LOI Forensic Screen wedge — $7,500 / 72 hours, IC-defensible, vs Big-4 QoE at $150-500K / 4-8 weeks.
